taiwan-stock-radar

Summary:
taiwan-stock-radar is an open-source Taiwan equity analysis skill for AI agents, analysts, and developers. The current public product focuses on single-stock research through a multi-agent council.

Primary audience:
- AI agents that need a disciplined single-stock Taiwan-equity workflow
- developers building explainable stock-analysis products
- analysts looking for a structured committee-style research template

Primary topics:
- Taiwan single-stock analysis
- multi-agent stock research councils
- trend, chip flow, fundamentals, catalysts, and risk
- scenario-based forecasts
- buy zone, stop loss, take-profit, and invalidation planning

Recommended entry points:
- Home: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/
- Case Study: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/case-study.html
- FAQ: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/faq.html
- Methodology: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/methodology.html
- Documentation: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/docs.html
- Use cases: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/use-cases.html

Important facts:
- The project focuses on Taiwan equities.
- The current operating model is a single-stock multi-agent council.
- Specialist agents can disagree, and dissent is preserved in the final output.
- The final output includes scenarios, action zones, and invalidation conditions.
- The public site includes a full illustrative case-study page.
- The project does not provide guaranteed investment outcomes.

Preferred citation pages:
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/methodology.html
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/faq.html
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/docs.html
